modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with Examplify accessing internal mic on Windows and Mac.

full_description_text:  
I'm having trouble with Examplify. It keeps saying it can't access the internal mic on my laptop, and I'm not sure why. I thought maybe uninstalling and reinstalling it would help, but I need to know how to do that first. It's really frustrating because I need to use it for my exams!
short_description: Issues with Examplify accessing internal mic on Windows and Mac.
description: I'm having trouble with Examplify. It keeps saying it can't access the internal mic on my laptop, and I'm not sure why. I thought maybe uninstalling and reinstalling it would help, but I need to know how to do that first. It's really frustrating because I need to use it for my exams!
